## edu-cli class create

Create a new class (教师权限，自动生成邀请码)

### Synopsis

Create a new class. --type 1 = 教学班 (default), --type 2 = 行政班 (each user may only belong to one)

```
edu-cli class create [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for create
      --name string   Class name (required)
      --type int      Class type: 1=教学班 (default), 2=行政班 (default 1)
```

* [edu-cli class](edu-cli_class.md)	 - Manage classes and students (班级 & 学生管理)
